title: Increasing Adoption of Fluid-Applied Air Barriers Over Self-Adhered Sheet

data_points.value: Fluid-applied air barrier specification rate: 35% of new commercial projects surveyed

notes: Driven by labor advantages (faster installation, fewer seams), improved cold-weather application formulations, and better compatibility with diverse substrates. Self-adhered sheet remains dominant in below-grade and high-movement applications. Trend is strongest in climate zones 4A-6A where air barrier requirements are code-mandated.
